summary: Phase 8 (Model Tiering Config) complete. All 5 tasks done with 5 atomic commits. 13 new core tests, 14 new CLI tests. This was the FINAL phase — the unified code review pipeline (8 phases) is now fully implemented.
learnings: ModelTierConfig type and resolveModelTier function follow config-then-provider-default-then-undefined resolution chain
ReviewConfigSchema in CLI wraps ModelTierConfigSchema, both use optional fields throughout for graceful partial config
